_comment: LLM-behavior smoke test exam. Originally weighted toward market sources (polymarket=4, manifold=3) to surface the Gemini-3.1-Pro polymarket/manifold tool-rejection bug; that bug was fixed 2026-04-29 so we reduced to 1 per source for faster smokes (9 questions × 2 trials = 18 trials per run, ~5 min wall). Used by src/testing/test_completion_rate.py.
